proposed.name: dag-status-lifecycle
proposed.claim: DAG node status follows a directed transition: active -> superseded | retracted | retired, with all non-active states terminal and requiring the appropriate linkage fields; retired is the directive-only exit - a withdrawn rule, never a falsified claim
invariants: status is a closed enum: active | superseded | retracted | retired
superseded_by is non-null iff status is superseded
retracted_on and retracted_reason are non-null iff status is retracted
retired status is exclusive to directives - descriptive claims are superseded or retracted, never retired; an inference is falsified, a directive is violated or withdrawn
terminal states (superseded, retracted, retired) have no outgoing transitions and are immutable except for appending to evidence

reasoning: cb-schema-v2: retired widens from contract-grade implications to any directive (a withdrawn rule retires whether or not it carries machine-checkable teeth); the contract-field transition requirement drops accordingly. Direction-of-fit grounding via cb:a471.
